summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY6/26 increased to ¥40/share (ordinary ¥35 + commemorative ¥5) from previously forecast ¥35/share. Increase of ¥5/share ordinary dividend from prior forecast of ¥30/share ordinary. Rationale: balance between shareholder returns, internal reserves for business expansion, and medium-to-long-term value creation.
title_en: Notice of Revision of Dividend Forecast (Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending June 2026
translation_en_brief: Hit Co., Ltd. (378A, TSE Growth) announced on 14 May 2026 a revision upward of its year-end dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 30 June 2026. The dividend per share has been increased from a prior forecast of ¥35 to ¥40 (comprised of ordinary dividend of ¥35 and commemorative dividend of ¥5). The ordinary component alone has been raised by ¥5, from a previously forecasted ¥30 to ¥35. The company cited its policy of continuous and stable shareholder returns, balanced against internal reserves needed for business expansion and medium-to-long-term value creation. The revision reflects fiscal year 2026 performance trends and overall review of the operating environment and business strategy. The resolution was adopted by the board on 14 May 2026 and will be put to a shareholder vote at the 36th Annual General Meeting scheduled for September 2026.
